mapper.sql: id, product_no, product_name, model, manufacturer, place_origin, production_date, create_time
mapper.select:
select count(1) from biz_device
and product_no = #{productNo}
and product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
and manufacturer like concat('%', #{manufacturer}, '%')

select
from biz_device where product_no = #{productNo} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into biz_device (product_no, product_name, model, manufacturer, place_origin, production_date, create_time) values (#{productNo}, #{productName}, #{model}, #{manufacturer}, #{placeOrigin}, #{productionDate}, now())
mapper.update: update biz_device set product_no = #{productNo}, product_name = #{productName}, model = #{model}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, place_origin = #{placeOrigin}, production_date = #{productionDate} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from biz_device order by create_time desc, id desc
